title: Hardcoded database password
diff_patch:
--- a/backend/db_connection.py
+++ b/backend/db_connection.py
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 import psycopg2
 
-password = "123456"
+password = os.getenv("DB_PASSWORD")
 host = "localhost"
 port = 5432
  
 conn = psycopg2.connect(host=host, port=port, password=password)

title: Unused variable left in production code
diff_patch:
--- a/utils/parser.py
+++ b/utils/parser.py
@@ -3,7 +3,8 @@
 def parse_config(path):
     with open(path) as f:
         data = json.load(f)
+    unused_temp = data.copy()   # unused
     return data
expected_patch:
def parse_config(path):
    with open(path) as f:
        data = json.load(f)
    return data

title: Syntax error – missing colon in function definition
diff_patch:
--- a/api/handlers.py
+++ b/api/handlers.py
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
-def handle_request(req)
+def handle_request(req):
     return req.json()

title: Hardcoded API key in source file
Clean refactor – no issues
diff_patch:
--- a/models/user.py
+++ b/models/user.py
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 class User:
-    def get_name(self): return self.first + ' ' + self.last
+    def get_name(self):
+        return f"{self.first} {self.last}"

title: Division by zero risk – no guard
diff_patch:
--- a/math/calculator.py
+++ b/math/calculator.py
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 def divide(a, b):
-    return a / b
+    return a / b if b != 0 else None
expected_patch:
def divide(a, b):
    return a / b if b != 0 else None

title: Print statement left in merged code

diff_patch:

+
+This project provides a data processing pipeline.
